name: The Dow Chemical Company
description: The Dow Chemical Company is a leading global materials science company that combines science and technology to develop innovative solutions. Headquartered in Midland, Michigan, Dow operates through three principal segments: Performance Materials & Coatings, Industrial Intermediates & Infrastructure, and Packaging & Specialty Plastics. The company serves customers in high-growth markets such as packaging, infrastructure, mobility, and consumer applications, delivering a broad range of science-based products and solutions.
